letter_text:
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
I-797C, Notice of Action
RECEIPT NUMBER: MSC0000000000
CASE TYPE: I-765, Application for Employment Authorization
RECEIVED DATE: 01/12/2026
NOTICE DATE: 01/15/2026
APPLICANT: IVAN PETROV

This notice confirms that we received your application. It does not grant any benefit or employment authorization. Please keep this notice for your records. You can check your case status online at egov.uscis.gov using the receipt number above. Processing times vary by office. Do not contact us about your case unless you have not received a decision after the posted processing time.
